creator: barbara.xxx1975@libero.it
text:
Sorry for filing a pr about that: I tried to write to both dinoex and ports mailing list, but I'm receiving a reply with "550-5.3.2 Service currently unavailable".

It seems that in the last change in MOVED, a pipe before the date is missing.
http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/cvsweb.cgi/ports/MOVED.diff?r1=1.2928;r2=1.2929;f=h

Regards
Barbara
